overview: This service object performs an initial synchronization of contract data from an external system.
execution_flow: Service is instantiated with a contract identifier
External API is queried for contract data
Existing records are looked up or updated

components.name: initialize
components.role: Stores the contract identifier for later use

components.name: fetch_external_contract
components.role: Retrieves contract data from external API

data_flow: Contract identifier is passed into the service
External contract data is mapped to internal attributes
Attributes are persisted to the database
assumptions: External API returns valid contract data
Associated person record exists or can be created
